name: Branola Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients on the bread cycle.
This will produce a large loaf in Welbilt or Hitachi machines.
2. If prepared on the dough cycle, or by hand and after the first rising,
punch down the dough and form into two loaves.
3. Place each loaf in an 8-inch loaf pan.
4. Let rise until nicely rounded.
5. Bake at 375°F for 35-40 minutes or until the loaves sound hollow.
